texto: In our new age of terrifying, lethal gadgets, which supplanted so swiftly the old one, the first great aggressive war, if it should come, will be launched by suicidal little madmen pressing an electronic button. Such a war will not last long and none will ever follow it. There will be no conquerors and no conquests, but only the charred bones of the dead on and uninhabited planet.
explicacao: Orientação direta de William L. Shirer sobre temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. A afirmação “In our new age of terrifying, lethal gadgets, which supplanted so swiftly the old one, the first …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a desenvolvimento-pessoal, nuclear-war, nuclear-weapons, útil em momentos de nuclear-weapons e war.

texto: Adolf Hitler is probably the last of the great adventurer-conquerors in the tradition of Alexander, Caesar and Napoleon, and the Third Reich the last of the empires which set out on the path taken earlier by France, Rome and Macedonia. The curtain was rung down on that phase of history, at least, by the sudden invention of the hydrogen bomb, of the ballistic missile and of rockets that can be aimed to hit the moon.
explicacao: Citação de William L. Shirer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Adolf Hitler is probably the last of the great adventurer-conquerors in the tradition of Alexande…” articula reflexao, conquest, history em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como history e hitler.

texto: To some Germans and, no doubt, to most foreigners it appeared that a charlatan had come to power in Berlin. To the majority of Germans Hitler had — or would shortly assume — the aura of a truly charismatic leader. They were to follow him blindly, as if he possessed a divine judgment, for the next twelve tempestuous years.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William L. Shirer: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a lideranca. O trecho “To some Germans and, no doubt, to most foreigners it appeared that a charlatan had come to power …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que lideranca, history, nazi-germany pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de nazi-germany.
